skills.name: browser
skills.title: Browser
skills.description: use for known-url browser work, rendered-page extraction, authenticated pages, live UI verification, Interact with docs and JS-heavy pages, screenshots, accessibility snapshots, and browser evidence. use when provided a URL to inspect, test or verify a webpage or UI, needs scraping/fetching from, wants screenshots or truth, or  pages that require clicking, filling, login state, tabs, accordions, or auth. use built-in web search for discovery first, and use browser known-url, use togther.
skills.trigger: use for known-url browser work, rendered-page extraction, authenticated pages, live UI verification, Interact with docs and JS-heavy pages, screenshots, accessibility snapshots, and browser evidence. use when provided a URL to inspect, test or verify a webpage or UI, needs scraping/fetching from, wants screenshots or truth, or  pages that require clicking, filling, login state, tabs, accordions, or auth. use built-in web search for discovery first, and use browser known-url, use togther.

skills.name: consuelo-design
skills.title: Consuelo Design
skills.description: Top-level orchestration skill for Consuelo Design artifact work. Teaches agents how to chain existing workspace tools, design facade scripts, templates, browser validation, durable publishing, and design wiki verification.
skills.trigger: Invoke when the user asks for Consuelo Design artifact work, design wiki publishing, website/spec/demo generation, or design workflow orchestration.

skills.name: consuelo-design-landing-page
skills.title: Consuelo Design Landing Page (compatibility alias)
skills.description: Deprecated compatibility alias for the landing-page subskill under the top-level consuelo-design skill. Prefer consuelo-design with subskill=landing-page for new design work.
skills.trigger: Invoke only for legacy calls that still reference the old consuelo-design-landing-page skill name.

skills.name: consuelo-workspace-snapshot
skills.title: Consuelo Workspace Snapshot
skills.description: Reads a structured, read-only snapshot of Consuelo workspace objects, including Files and Attachments, through the configured Consuelo GraphQL/API facade.
skills.trigger: Invoke when the user asks an agent to inspect Consuelo workspace records, files, attachments, tasks, notes, dashboards, or GraphQL-backed workspace context.

skills.name: daily-revenue-brief
skills.title: Daily Revenue Brief
skills.description: Builds a daily workspace revenue brief from approved structured context and writes a local artifact.
skills.trigger: Invoke when the user asks for a daily revenue brief, revenue summary, or workspace revenue artifact.

skills.name: debugger
skills.title: Debugger
skills.description: Use this OS skill for runtime debugging across browser behavior, deployment logs, error tracking, analytics, and code evidence. Invoke it for bug triage, incidents, post-merge validation, frontend regressions, worker or queue issues, telephony flows, observability checks, and reconciling runtime truth with code assumptions.
skills.trigger: Use this OS skill for runtime debugging across browser behavior, deployment logs, error tracking, analytics, and code evidence. Invoke it for bug triage, incidents, post-merge validation, frontend regressions, worker or queue issues, telephony flows, observability checks, and reconciling runtime truth with code assumptions.

skills.name: handoff
skills.title: Handoff
skills.description: Use this skill when the user asks to create, read, update, search, summarize, or continue from handoff/context records so another agent or future session can pick up the work safely.
skills.trigger: Use this skill when the user asks to create, read, update, search, summarize, or continue from handoff/context records so another agent or future session can pick up the work safely.

skills.name: research-ingest
skills.title: Research Ingest
skills.description: use this skill when ko sends a youtube, podcast, article, paper, pdf, media link, or local source and wants to learn from it, discuss it, turn it into notes, compare it with other sources, or save it as durable research. this skill governs the research ingest workflow: run the workspace research ingest tool, create packet/extracted/manifest artifacts, automatically save their full text to context, then reason from the saved bundle. use for research packets, source ingestion, podcast/video learning, durable context, and follow-up analysis from ingested sources..
skills.trigger: use this skill when ko sends a youtube, podcast, article, paper, pdf, media link, or local source and wants to learn from it, discuss it, turn it into notes, compare it with other sources, or save it as durable research. this skill governs the research ingest workflow: run the workspace research ingest tool, create packet/extracted/manifest artifacts, automatically save their full text to context, then reason from the saved bundle. use for research packets, source ingestion, podcast/video learning, durable context, and follow-up analysis from ingested sources..

skills.name: senior-engineer
skills.title: Senior Engineer
skills.description: Use this skill for any coding, debugging, refactoring, architecture, validation, or task in the repository. This skill is the default engineering mode. Invoke it whenever the assistant is expected to read code, change code, diagnose a bug, design an implementation plan, review a diff, run tests, validate behavior, or prepare a PR.
skills.trigger: Use this skill for any coding, debugging, refactoring, architecture, validation, or task in the repository. This skill is the default engineering mode. Invoke it whenever the assistant is expected to read code, change code, diagnose a bug, design an implementation plan, review a diff, run tests, validate behavior, or prepare a PR.

skills.name: sites
skills.title: Sites
skills.description: Use this skill for Consuelo OS Sites: the user-facing local site system for generated docs, reports, files, pages, traces, diffs, and Office as one site category. Artifacts remain the internal durable provenance and storage records behind Sites.
skills.trigger: Invoke when the user asks about OS Sites, generated work surfaces, local Sites pages, the Office site, artifact-backed output, traces, diffs, or refreshing and finding local Sites.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.title: Skill Creator
skills.description: Use this OS operator skill when creating, migrating, editing, validating, or reviewing opensaas/Consuelo OS skills. It turns skill workflows into repo-backed skill folders, skill.json metadata, migration fixtures, replacement allowlists, registry generation, install seeding, and tests, with exact-copy guardrails unless Ko explicitly approves a rewrite.
skills.trigger: Use this OS operator skill when creating, migrating, editing, validating, or reviewing opensaas/Consuelo OS skills. It turns skill workflows into repo-backed skill folders, skill.json metadata, migration fixtures, replacement allowlists, registry generation, install seeding, and tests, with exact-copy guardrails unless Ko explicitly approves a rewrite.

skills.name: task
skills.title: Task Workflow
skills.description: Use this skill for any opensaas task lifecycle work: starting a task, researching, editing, publishing, creating the stream review PR, handling task metadata conflicts, or cleaning up. It enforces stream.context → task.start → task.push → task.pr → task.finish, explicit branch usage, verified tool results, metadata-only conflict rules, and reporting the stream/<area> → main review PR instead of the intermediate task PR.
skills.trigger: Invoke when the user asks to start, run, validate, publish, promote, inspect, recover, or finish repo/task-scoped work in a stream.

skills.name: teach
skills.title: Teach
skills.description: Use this skill when the user asks the OS agent to teach them a daily deep idea, create an AI-seeded learning guide, ingest a research source for teaching, or publish a durable Sites guide that explains one transferable concept. It coordinates research ingest, typed guide rendering, Sites publishing, and optional teach state updates.
skills.trigger: Invoke when the user asks to teach, learn one idea, run Daily Deep Idea, create an AI learning guide, explain a paper/source as a durable lesson, or set up/swap an auto-teaching topic queue.
